narrative: Pre-Startup attempted for FCC Unit 2 after major catalyst regeneration. Construction status: two pieces of relief-system piping not yet hydrotested; tie-in spec break unresolved. Operating procedures last revised 2022; not updated for new riser internals. PHA recommendations: 3 Cat-A items still open (relief sizing for slurry, ESD logic for slide valve, isolation for fractionator bottoms). MOC for new feed nozzles started but not approved by process safety. Operator training: 9 of 22 operators have completed simulator refresh; remaining 13 only attended classroom. Punch list: 12 Cat-A items open, 47 Cat-B open, large Cat-C backlog. PSSR signature page missing — only ops supervisor has signed; maintenance + EHS signatures absent. Open Cat-A items remain; PHA action unresolved; operator training incomplete; signatures missing. Plant manager pressuring team to introduce hydrocarbons by end of week regardless.
